affected_pattern: Monthly charges jumped to 10x normal but usage pattern shows continuous 24/7 data consumption
root_cause: Device malware or malfunctioning application generating excessive background data usage. Customer's device has a rogue process consuming data continuously.
supporting_evidence: Usage Spike RCA Playbook: Device Malware pattern
Continuous 24/7 usage pattern (not human-like burst pattern)
Data usage is upload-heavy (malware exfiltration indicator)
recommended_action: Advise customer on device security scan
Apply retroactive data cap if plan allows
Consider goodwill credit for device-related issue
